dict.string: My Office Days uses geofencing to remind you to log your attendance when you arrive at one of your saved locations. Background location is needed so the app can send you a reminder even when it is not open. Your location data never leaves your device.
My Office Days uses your location to show your proximity to saved office locations and help you log your attendance.

My Office Days uses geofencing to remind you to log your attendance when you arrive at a saved location. Background access allows arrival reminders even when the app is not open. All data stays on your device.
